local_dishes.name: Sukiyaki

local_dishes.name: Gyoza
local_dishes.description: Pan-fried dumplings with pork or vegetable filling

local_dishes.name: Vegetarian Ramen (Yasai Ramen)

local_dishes.name: Onigiri (Rice Balls)
local_dishes.description: Rice triangles often filled with pickled plum (umeboshi) or seasoned vegetables

local_dishes.name: Vegetable Tempura
local_dishes.description: Lightly battered and fried vegetables like sweet potato, pumpkin, and eggplant

local_dishes.name: Japanese Vegetable Curry (Yasai Kare)
local_dishes.description: Mild, slightly sweet curry with potatoes, carrots, and onions served with rice

local_dishes.name: Inari Sushi
local_dishes.description: Sweet tofu pockets stuffed with vinegared rice; usually vegetarian

local_dishes.name: Edamame
local_dishes.description: Steamed young soybeans sprinkled with salt; a simple and healthy snack

local_dishes.name: Soba Noodles (Vegetarian)
local_dishes.description: Buckwheat noodles served cold with dipping sauce or hot in broth (confirm no fish stock)
local_dishes.where_to_try: Soba Shop Meiji no Yakata Annex

local_dishes.name: Vegetable Yakitori / Kushiyaki
local_dishes.description: Grilled skewers of mushrooms, peppers, or tofu (ask for no meat/fish)

local_dishes.name: Goma-ae
local_dishes.description: Spinach or vegetables dressed in a rich sesame sauce

local_dishes.name: Shojin Ryori
local_dishes.description: Traditional Buddhist temple cuisine; fully vegetarian and beautifully presented

local_dishes.name: Matcha Desserts
local_dishes.description: Matcha ice cream, mochi, or cakes made with green tea flavor

local_dishes.name: Yaki Imo
local_dishes.description: Roasted Japanese sweet potato, a popular street snack

where_to_buy: Limited-edition flavours like matcha, sakura, or sake. Beautifully boxed for gifting
Soft banana cream sponge cakes in adorable packaging. Short shelf life, best bought at the end of the trip
Elegant gift for tea lovers. Look for high-quality brands in Uji/Kyoto or select Tokyo department stores
Temple and shrine amulets for luck, exams, or travel
Lightweight traditional clothing, stylish gifts for friends/family
Beautiful multipurpose cloths with traditional prints
Elegant tableware, tea sets, and lacquerware
Fun collectible mini toys from vending machines; great for kids or quirky gifts

transport_options.description: Bullet train from Shin-Osaka to Tokyo Station
Local train connecting various Tokyo destinations
Direct train from Tokyo Station to Narita Airport with reserved seating
Direct train from Tokyo Station to Narita Airport with reserved seating and luggage space
Local train connecting central Tokyo areas

transport_options.cost: 24 hr ticket Rs. 440, 48hr ticket Rs. 650, free for below 5s

transport_options.description: Japan's iconic bullet train journey - one of the world's most efficient and comfortable train journeys
Circular line connecting major Tokyo districts
Rechargeable contactless smart card used for trains, subways, and buses. Simply tap in and tap out at gates. Cards are interchangeable between cities
transport_options.cost: ¥500 refundable deposit plus loaded amount (¥1,000–¥5,000 recommended to start)

transport_options.description: Major circular train line connecting key areas of Tokyo
Connects Haneda Airport to central Tokyo
Direct train service from Narita Airport to central Tokyo
Automated transit system serving Odaiba and waterfront areas
Monorail connecting Tokyo Disney Resort parks and hotels
